text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world. Image recognition allows computers to identify objects, people, or scenes in photos and videos. Object detection goes further by locating where specific items, such as cars or animals, are in an image. These technologies have many applications, from security systems and medical imaging to augmented reality. One important use is in self-driving cars, where computer vision helps vehicles recognise traffic signs, pedestrians, and other vehicles, allowing them to navigate safely without human input.
